nasb.text: When the Lord saw her, He felt compassion for her, and said to her, “Do not weep.”

esv.text: And when the Lord saw her, he had compassion on her and said to her, “Do not weep.”

cnv.text: 主看見了，就憐憫她，對她說：“不要哭！”

ccb.text: 耶稣看见那寡妇，怜悯之心油然而生，就对她说：“不要哭！”

csbs.text: 主看见那寡妇，就对她动了怜悯之心，向她说：“不要哭了！”
